description: Dystopian novel about surveillance and control

title: Revolution 2020: Love, Corruption, Ambition
description: A story set in Varanasi about three friends : Gopal, Raghav, and Aarti, caught between ambition, love, and corruption. It explores the flaws in India’s education system and how choices between money, power, and integrity shape their lives.
thoughts: chetan really is a heartbroken guy lol.
